svg.title: Flood-Ready Streets: REST API Endpoint Design
svg.desc: All REST API endpoints grouped by: Streets, Reports, and Priority allocation
svg.text: List all street segments with risk scores and metadata
Single street detail: coords, score history, resources assigned
Update risk score (called by AI pipeline after analysis)
GeoJSON heatmap data for the official map view
Submit report: image (Firebase Storage URL) + lat/lng + street_id
Single report: image URL, Vision AI analysis result, timestamp
Official marks report verified/dismissed; triggers score update
Trigger Vertex AI Vision on a report image; return severity label

g.text: AI-recommended priority streets for resource allocation

svg.text: Top-N streets ranked by composite risk score + flood probability
Run Gemini: ingest weather alert text → return updated risk rules
Current resource assignments: which pump/truck/crew → which street
Official assigns resource type (pump/truck/crew) to a street_id
Remove a resource assignment when work is done
Base URL: http://localhost:5000 (Flask dev) — all routes prefixed /api
